query: 请帮我修改 Shopify Online Store 2.0 的商品详情页，并先写入指定草稿主题验收，不要发布。
Use the Shopify theme delivery workflow to migrate these Liquid sections while preserving Theme Editor content and app blocks.
集合页筛选用了 MutationObserver，页面一直触发 requestAnimationFrame。请修复并证明初次渲染和一次外部更新后都能稳定。
这个 Shopify 预览和源码不一致，按主题身份、模板绑定、远程回读、release marker 和缓存顺序诊断。
Prepare a bounded draft-theme write manifest, checksum readback, desktop/mobile acceptance, and handoff. Do not publish.
重做 Shopify 首页、分类页、详情页和搜索页，先输出完整 surface matrix 和品牌保留规则。
Audit whether this templates/product.json change belongs in the JSON template or a Liquid section, then validate the package.
Shopify predictive search looks correct but may be looping. Build an isolated settling regression before touching the draft theme.
把主题改动一次性写入指定 unpublished theme，精确回读文件并确认 live theme 未变化。
Create a release handoff for a Shopify theme draft with rollback identity, exclusions, preview evidence, and explicit not-published state.
帮我批量修改 Shopify 商品标题、标签和库存。
Build a Shopify app extension that validates checkout discounts.
请分析这个独立 React 网站的首页 CSS，不涉及 Shopify。
给我推荐三个适合美甲店的 Shopify 应用。
把这份 CSV 的订单数据做成销售报表。
修复 Next.js API route 的数据库超时问题。
Publish this npm package to the JavaScript registry after running its unit tests.
Translate these product descriptions into French and update the catalog data.
Create a Figma mockup for a wholesale landing page, but do not implement a Shopify theme.
Review the security of our Shopify Admin API credentials and webhook signing.
